src: A smooth green ceramic cup with a glossy texture and white interior. The cup has a standard handle and cylindrical shape, reflecting light subtly on its surface.
edit: A translucent iridescent cup with a pearlescent sheen. The handle and interior glimmer with shifting hues, creating a mystical look with soft, shimmering light reflections.

per_image_non_shared_src.0: The object is tilted diagonally on a black leather surface. The background includes soft-focus flooring and blurred furniture, with a cozy indoor setting and a hint of ambient light.
per_image_non_shared_src.1: The object is tilted diagonally on a dark leather surface. The background consists of stacked books and a blurred desk environment, with subtle wooden textures and tech gadgets.
per_image_non_shared_src.2: The object is held upright in a hand, centered in the image. The background features a room with wooden drawers, a white standing fan, and scattered household items under soft lighting.
per_image_non_shared_src.3: The object is placed upright on a wooden surface. The background includes an array of electronics, a wooden desk, visible cables, and a softly lit office environment.

per_image_non_shared_edit.0: The object is tilted diagonally on a black leather surface. Dream-like soft focus flooring and ethereal furniture appear with whimsical ambient light in a dream setting.
per_image_non_shared_edit.1: The object is tilted diagonally on a dark leather surface. Stacked books and a blurred desk transform into an abstract dream setting with surreal wooden textures and tech gadgets.
per_image_non_shared_edit.2: The object is held upright in a hand, centered in the image. The room with wooden drawers and a fan becomes part of a dream setting with scattered dream-like household items.
per_image_non_shared_edit.3: The object is placed upright on a wooden surface. Electronics and a wooden desk are bathed in a surreal dream light, creating an ethereal office environment.
